eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED MONTHLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Shasta, CA; at 10:50 AM ON MAR 4, 2026 Effective until 11:50 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: THIS IS A TEST OF THE EMERGENCY ALERT SYSTEM FOR SHASTA COUNTY. IN THE EVENT OF AN ACTUAL EMERGENCY, TUNE TO THIS STATION FOR IMPORTANT INFORMATION.
